name: Braised Leeks with Dill
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup Nonfat Vegetable Broth, Low Sodium or Vegetable Broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse leeks under cool running water.
2. Halve them lengthwise, peeling off the tough outer layer and including about 2 inches of the green tops.
3. Rinch them again.
4. Slice onions, chop garlic, and peel, seed and chop tomato.
5. In a skillet, sauté onions and garlic in olive oil for 2 minutes.
6. Add onions, garlic, leeks, tomato, and broth into slow cooker; cover and cook on low for 6 to 10 hours.
7. Salt and pepper to taste at the end of cooking.
8. Garnish with chopped dill at serving time.
Serves 6
